examples: This paper presents the operating principle of a new lateral shearing interferometer.
A year later, so did the ground-based Degree Angular Scale Interferometer at the South Pole.
Another interferometer with arms of the same length is under construction at Kamioka in Japan.
GEO600 (because the interferometer arms are 600 metres long) started taking scientifically useful data in Hanover last month.
The interferometer in Japan is being built underground and will be kept at extremely low temperatures to minimise stray vibrations.
